face.structure: sharp, high cheekbones with a delicate jawline and a slightly pointed chin

eyes.color: deep hazel with flecks of gold
details: thin black ring encircling the irises

face.expression: thoughtful with a slight furrow of the brows

skin.rendering_notes: soft shadows under cheekbones and a subtle highlight on the nose bridge

hair.color: deep chestnut brown with subtle auburn undertones
hair.style: layered bob just above shoulder length
hair.flow: naturally wavy, parted to one side
details: a few slightly tangled strands for a natural look

character.aura: a faint aura of calculated calmness and quiet confidence

details: white buttoned blouse visible under the blazer
simple silver brooch pinned to the lapel
outfit.fit: form-fitting but with room for comfortable movement

composition.pose: slightly angled to the left with face turned forward
composition.gesture: right hand subtly resting under the chin, left arm crossed over the body

background.details: impression of tall buildings and a clear sky
background.rules: minimal detail to keep the focus on the character
